---
title: "Numerical Methods for Differential Equations"
subtitle: "CORE-012 | Core Mathematics — Year 2"
description: "Rigorous numerical methods for solving the differential equations that arise in every domain of this curriculum. Covers finite difference, finite element, and spectral methods with convergence theory."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Numerical Methods for Differential Equations

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
